rows: Scoped auth registration controller/service flow, DTO validation rules, CAPTCHA guard, and verification-email trigger path

Cover successful guarded registration, broker or freelancer skill persistence, duplicate-email rejection, legal-consent enforcement, CAPTCHA blocking, and DTO validation failures for the implemented register-account flow.
The submitted email address is not already used
CAPTCHA is either disabled or solved successfully
Role is BROKER or FREELANCER with domainIds and skillIds
reCAPTCHA token is missing or invalid while enforcement is enabled
HTTP 201 response is returned and a new CLIENT account is created with hashed password plus verification-email trigger
Broker or freelancer domain and skill link rows are persisted along with the new account
ConflictException blocks duplicate-email registration without creating another user
ConflictException blocks registration when legal consent is missing
BadRequestException from CaptchaGuard blocks controller execution
HTTP 400 validation errors are returned and no user is created
